title: To Leucon占폾 II
content:
혻혻혻혻Seek not, Leucon占폾, to know how long you're going to live yet,
혻혻혻혻What boons the gods will yet withhold, or what they're going to give yet;
혻혻혻혻For Jupiter will have his way, despite how much we worry,--
혻혻혻혻Some will hang on for many a day, and some die in a hurry.
혻혻혻혻The wisest thing for you to do is to embark this diem
혻혻혻혻Upon a merry escapade with some such bard as I am.
혻혻혻혻And while we sport I'll reel you off such odes as shall surprise ye;
혻혻혻혻To-morrow, when the headache comes,--well, then I'll satirize ye!
meaning:
Eugene Field's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Leucon占폾 II"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
